requirements: R1: leads_to(tree, 'collect personal data', 'send email notification')
R2: executed_by(tree, 'collect personal data', 'credit bureau service')
R4: precedence(tree, 'determine loan risk level', 'check credit worthiness')
R5: precedence(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'check customer bank privilege')
R6: (executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'supervisor'))
R8: executed_by(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'branch office manager')
R9: (executed_by(tree, 'approve request', 'branch office manager') or executed_by(tree, 'reject request', 'branch office manager'))
R10: max_time_between(tree, 'sign loan contract', 'close loan contract offer', '7 working days')
R13: condition_directly_follows(tree, '(loanRequestCredit > 1000000) and (not executed_by(tree, "check credit worthiness", "clerk supervisor"))', 'create suspense file')
